Sway_Type_Description: Locations are a special type of Descendant that models a place in the Game, or Story. Some Locations are considered static (a house or a kingdom), but others can be mobile (a vehicle, or even a planet).
Seats are Locations that store extra Sway and are granted an Edge because of it. Seats represent the customizations, adaptations, and work that we do to our property to make them ours.

Real Estate is what we call a Location with Chi stored within it. Real Estate is considered more "Real" than other Locations, making it harder to be destroyed and altered significantly by Yarn-Tellers or Time Travel.
Locations that have been imbued with Yarn directly are like Real Estate, turned up to 11. They have multiple Edges and a few powerful Glows.
